title: Bump to v1.20.0 then v1.21.0-dev
body:
Since Skopeo now has the same versions of the c/* libraries as Buildah v1.41 and Podman v5.6, bumping it to v1.20.0 to go along with those for RHEL 9.7/10.1.    Once this merges, I'll tag and create a release branch.

The second commit is to 1.21.0-dev, to get the main branch back onto a dev version.

comments.body:
LGTM, but note https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2667#issuecomment-3145707101 .

As a demo https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2912 shows that c/image CI will be failing with this pairing of a c/image + Skopeo branch points. (It would probably be easiest to backport https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2907 onto the c/image branch, that way this PR doesn’t need to be remade.)
